changes.comment: Google Maps attribution text is rendered as plain text instead of HTML, preventing markup injection from server-provided copyright strings. OGC API Features source validation now applies the opt-in origin restriction (MapLayerFormatRegistry.restrictCredentialsToTrustedOrigins) to the collections link advertised by the landing document, so basic-auth credentials are no longer sent to unrelated origins; a blocked request that is then challenged reports MapLayerSourceStatus.UntrustedOrigin.
